titleStmt.title: SII 18.84: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 84. (B.K. No. 65 of 1933-34.) DAṆḌĀPUR, NARGUND TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab lying near the Jumma Masjid.

summary.p: This partly preserved inscription is dated in the Chālukya-Vikrama year 3, Kālayukta, Pushya, Uttarāyaṇa, Sunday. The details, which are incomplete, are irregular. In the cyclic year cited, the Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa fell on December 25, A.D. 1078, which was Tuesday, not Sunday. In the previous year, however, the Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkramaṇa occurred on Sunday, corresponding to A.D. 1077, December 24.

It records a grant of land made for bhaṭṭavṛitti by the Brāhmaṇas of Paḍuvagēri in the mahāgrahāra town Naṟugunda. The land granted was obtained by the donors from the Chālukya prince Vīra-Noḷambarāja.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti cāḷukyavikramakāla 3 ṟeneya kāḷayukta saṁvatsarada puṣyamāsōtta rāyaṇamuṁ
byatīpātamumādityavāramuṁ kūḍidakṣayamapsa tithiyoḷ . Akkara . nāḍoḷagryaru mahā
grahāraṁ naṟugundada paḍuvagēriya vipraru gāḍivettirppa ya keṟeyiṁ paḍuvalāṟu mattarkkeyyaṁ sa
rvvamānyaṁ bēḍi cāḷukya vīraneḷūṁbarājana kayyoḷpaḍedante śrutadānake māḍi bhaṭṭa vṛttigartthiyiṁ
ṭṭarācandrārkkatāraṁ salvannegaṁ . Ī dharmmamanaḷivanupabādhegaḷaṁ mārppanuṁ kuṟittesa
krōdhiyumirada sugatiyaṁ sādhisi raurava nigōdhakiḷigumamōgha . pa sugaḷaṁ pā
janaṁgaḷaṁ riśiyarumaṁ vaṟe kondana lōkakkesaguvarī bhaṭṭavṛttiya keḍisi The continuation is lost.
Digital edition of SII 18.84 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
